languages.text: "Скалларокс Истребитель, член банды Повелителей Ночи, терроризировавших окраины региона в период массового завоевания региона цивилизацией людей, известного как Анжуйский поход. Бракованный экспонат, получил значимые повреждения в результате сопротивления экстракции, однако для поиска замены имеет слишком низкую ценность".

traits.locale_text: "Скалларокс Истребитель, член банды Повелителей Ночи, терроризировавших окраины региона в период массового завоевания региона цивилизацией людей, известного как Анжуйский поход. Бракованный экспонат, получил значимые повреждения в результате сопротивления экстракции, однако для поиска замены имеет слишком низкую ценность".

languages.text: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."
languages.original_text: "Скалларокс Истребитель, член банды Повелителей Ночи, терроризировавших окраины региона в период массового завоевания региона цивилизацией людей, известного как Анжуйский поход. Бракованный экспонат, получил значимые повреждения в результате сопротивления экстракции, однако для поиска замены имеет слишком низкую ценность".

A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

"Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

"Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

languages.text: “毁灭者斯卡拉洛克斯，暗夜领主的成员。在人类文明对此区域展开大规模征服的时期——即安杰文远征期间，他曾在边境地带兴风作浪。这是个残次品，由于提取时反抗激烈，已经严重损坏。但其价值太低，不值得再去找一个替代品。”
languages.original_text: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

traits.locale_text: “毁灭者斯卡拉洛克斯，暗夜领主的成员。在人类文明对此区域展开大规模征服的时期——即安杰文远征期间，他曾在边境地带兴风作浪。这是个残次品，由于提取时反抗激烈，已经严重损坏。但其价值太低，不值得再去找一个替代品。”

languages.text: « Skallarox le Destructeur, membres des Night Lords, qui ont semé la terreur dans les confins de la région pendant la période de grandes conquêtes entreprise par la civilisation humaine, autrement nommée la Croisade d'Angevin. Une pièce qui présente certains défauts, ayant subi d'importants dégâts lors de son extraction forcée, mais sa valeur est trop faible pour que je prenne la peine d'en chercher une autre. »
languages.original_text: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

traits.locale_text: « Skallarox le Destructeur, membres des Night Lords, qui ont semé la terreur dans les confins de la région pendant la période de grandes conquêtes entreprise par la civilisation humaine, autrement nommée la Croisade d'Angevin. Une pièce qui présente certains défauts, ayant subi d'importants dégâts lors de son extraction forcée, mais sa valeur est trop faible pour que je prenne la peine d'en chercher une autre. »

languages.text: «Skallarox el Destructor, miembro de los Amos de la Noche, que aterrorizaron la linde de la región durante el período de conquista masiva conocido como la Cruzada de Angevin. Es un ejemplar defectuoso y sufrió daños considerables durante la extracción, pero su valor es demasiado bajo como para reemplazarlo».
languages.original_text: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

traits.locale_text: «Skallarox el Destructor, miembro de los Amos de la Noche, que aterrorizaron la linde de la región durante el período de conquista masiva conocido como la Cruzada de Angevin. Es un ejemplar defectuoso y sufrió daños considerables durante la extracción, pero su valor es demasiado bajo como para reemplazarlo».

languages.text: "Angevin Seferi olarak bilinen insan medeniyetinin bölgeyi kitlesel fethi döneminde, bölgenin sınırlarına dehşet saçan Gece Lordları'na mensup Yok Edici Skallarox. El konulmaya gösterdiği direnç nedeniyle önemli hasar görmüş kusurlu bir parça. Yine de yedeğini bulmaya değmeyecek kadar düşük değerli olduğu söylenebilir."
languages.original_text: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

traits.locale_text: "Angevin Seferi olarak bilinen insan medeniyetinin bölgeyi kitlesel fethi döneminde, bölgenin sınırlarına dehşet saçan Gece Lordları'na mensup Yok Edici Skallarox. El konulmaya gösterdiği direnç nedeniyle önemli hasar görmüş kusurlu bir parça. Yine de yedeğini bulmaya değmeyecek kadar düşük değerli olduğu söylenebilir."

languages.text: "Skallarox der Zerstörer, Mitglied der Night Lords, die die Ränder der Region während des Anjou-Kreuzzuges der menschlichen Zivilisation heimsuchten. Ein fehlerhaftes Stück, das aufgrund seines Widerstandes gegen die Extraktion beträchtlichen Schaden erlitten, aber einen zu geringen Wert hat, um ersetzt zu werden."
languages.original_text: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

traits.locale_text: "Skallarox der Zerstörer, Mitglied der Night Lords, die die Ränder der Region während des Anjou-Kreuzzuges der menschlichen Zivilisation heimsuchten. Ein fehlerhaftes Stück, das aufgrund seines Widerstandes gegen die Extraktion beträchtlichen Schaden erlitten, aber einen zu geringen Wert hat, um ersetzt zu werden."

languages.text: 「破壊者スカラーロックス、ナイトロードの一員。アンジェヴィン十字軍と呼ばれる人類文明によるこの地域の征服の最中、この地域周辺を恐怖に陥れた。抽出に抵抗したため、かなりの損傷を受けているが、交換用の部品を見つける価値はない。」
languages.original_text: "Skallarox the Destroyer, member of the Night Lords, who terrorised the fringes of the region during the period of mass conquest of the region by human civilisation known as the Angevin Crusade. A defective piece, which has sustained significant damage due to resistance to extraction, but it is of too low value to find a replacement."

traits.locale_text: 「破壊者スカラーロックス、ナイトロードの一員。アンジェヴィン十字軍と呼ばれる人類文明によるこの地域の征服の最中、この地域周辺を恐怖に陥れた。抽出に抵抗したため、かなりの損傷を受けているが、交換用の部品を見つける価値はない。」
